log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:20+3=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:12+-2=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Kobold — Unarmored Caster (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:6+9=15 vs AC 15] HIT! 27 damage. Kobold — Unarmored Caster HP: 40/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Kobold — Unarmored Caster.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Kobold — Unarmored Caster.
→ Javelin: [d20:18+6=24 vs AC 15] HIT! 9 damage. Kobold — Unarmored Caster HP: 31/67
REASONING: No concentration active. 3 enemies. Recasting Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:20+3=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:15+-2=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!

→ Rock: [d20:13+9=22 vs AC 15] HIT! 28 damage. Kobold — Unarmored Caster HP: 3/67
--- Kobold — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 3/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (3/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Kobold — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Kobold — Unarmored Caster (distant).
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Kobold — Unarmored Caster.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Kobold — Unarmored Caster.
--- Kobold — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 3/67 | AC: 15 | Cond: [invisible] | Conc: Greater Invisibility
REASONING: Concentrating on Greater Invisibility. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
